chunks.text:
Browser Architecture is an important concept in modern software development. It plays a key role in building scalable,
maintainable, and efficient applications used in real-world systems. Developers use this technology or concept together
with other tools in the tech stack to design reliable solutions. Understanding how browser architecture works helps
engineers make better architectural and implementation decisions.
